# CD2 Email SDK

> Send and track transactional email with @cdv2/email, the Resend-style TypeScript client for the CD2 sender API.

`@cdv2/email` is the TypeScript client for the CD2 sender API, modeled on Resend’s SDK. Published to npm as [`@cdv2/email`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@cdv2/email). Works in Node, Bun, and the browser — plain `fetch`, zero deps, ESM-only.

## Install

```sh
bun add @cdv2/email
```

Head to the [Quickstart](/quickstart/) to construct a client and send your first email.
